Package neqsim.process.safety.barrier

Class SafetySystemPerformanceReport.BarrierAssessment

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.barrier.SafetySystemPerformanceReport.BarrierAssessment
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
SafetySystemPerformanceReport
public static class SafetySystemPerformanceReport.BarrierAssessment extends Object implements Serializable
Assessment of one barrier for one demand case or generic register check.
Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL
